title: subjects_merged/v1 payload
description: Payload for identity-lifecycle merge events. Emitted with envelope type=capture. Recorded when a coordinator determines two subject UUIDs refer to the same real-world entity. The retired_id is never re-used; alias resolution routes it to surviving_id for all projection.

surviving_id.description: The subject UUID that continues to identify the entity.

retired_id.description: The subject UUID that is retired in favour of surviving_id.

reason.description: Optional explanation of the merge decision.
